documentation:
## Aliyun ROS DDOS Construct Library

This module is part of the AliCloud ROS Cloud Development Kit (ROS CDK) project.

```python
import * as DDOS from '@alicloud/ros-cdk-ddos';
```

classes.name: ros_cdk_ddos.OriginInstance

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.OriginInstance.__init__
documentation:
Param scope - scope in which this resource is defined Param id - scoped id of the resource Param props - resource properties.

```
param scope



param id



param props



param enable_resource_property_constraint

```

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.OriginInstance.attr_instance_id
documentation: Attribute InstanceId: The ID of the instance.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::DDoS::OriginInstance`, which is used to create an Anti-DDoS Origin instance.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosOriginInstance\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-ddos-origininstance>

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.OriginInstanceProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `OriginInstance`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-ddos-origininstance>

```
param edition

Property edition: Edition of the instance. Valid values: - enterprise: Enterprise Edition. - smb: Affordable and general edition for small and medium-sized enterprises.

param protection_mode

Property protectionMode: The mode of the protection. Valid values: unlimited: The Unlimited protection mode is intended for internal use within enterprises.

param charge_type

Property chargeType: The charge type of the instance. Valid values: PostPaid: Pay-as-you-go. PrePaid: Subscription.

param clean_bandwidth

Property cleanBandwidth: The mitigation capability of Anti-DDoS is measured by the inbound or outbound clean bandwidth. When Edition is enterprise, CleanBandwidth ranges from 100 to 1000 Mbit/s.When Edition is smb， CleanBandwidth ranges from 50 to 1000 Mbit/s.

param enable_log

Property enableLog: Whether to enable protection logs.

param ip_addresses

Property ipAddresses: The number of ip addresses. When Edition is smb， IP Addresses ranges from 1 to 29. When Edition is enterprise, The minimum number of IP Addresses is 30.

param network_protocol

Property networkProtocol: The network protocol of the instance. Valid values: v4: IPv4. v6: IPv6. v4_6: IPv4+IPv6.

param period

Property period: The period of the instance.

param period_unit

Property periodUnit: The period unit of the instance. Valid values: Month: Month. Year: Year.

param tags

Property tags: Tags to attach to instance. Max support 20 tags to add during create instance. Each tag with two properties Key and Value, and Key is required.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.OriginInstanceProps.edition
documentation:
Property edition: Edition of the instance.

Valid values:

- enterprise: Enterprise Edition.
- smb: Affordable and general edition for small and medium-sized enterprises.

Valid values:
unlimited: The Unlimited protection mode is intended for internal use within enterprises.

Valid values:
PostPaid: Pay-as-you-go.
PrePaid: Subscription.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.OriginInstanceProps.clean_bandwidth
documentation:
Property cleanBandwidth: The mitigation capability of Anti-DDoS is measured by the inbound or outbound clean bandwidth.

When Edition is enterprise, CleanBandwidth ranges from 100 to 1000 Mbit/s.When Edition is smb， CleanBandwidth ranges from 50 to 1000 Mbit/s.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.OriginInstanceProps.enable_log
documentation: Property enableLog: Whether to enable protection logs.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.OriginInstanceProps.ip_addresses
documentation:
Property ipAddresses: The number of ip addresses.

When Edition is smb， IP Addresses ranges from 1 to 29.
When Edition is enterprise, The minimum number of IP Addresses is 30.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.OriginInstanceProps.network_protocol

Property networkProtocol: The network protocol of the instance.

Valid values:
v4: IPv4.

Max support 20 tags to add during create instance. Each tag with two properties Key and Value, and Key is required.

classes.name: ros_cdk_ddos.Policy

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.Policy.__init__
documentation:
Param scope - scope in which this resource is defined Param id - scoped id of the resource Param props - resource properties.

```
param scope



param id



param props



param enable_resource_property_constraint

```

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.Policy.attr_content
documentation: Attribute Content: Configuration Content.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.Policy.attr_policy_id
documentation: Attribute PolicyId: The ID of the policy.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.Policy.attr_policy_name
documentation: Attribute PolicyName: The name of the policy.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.Policy.attr_type
documentation: Attribute Type: The type of the policy.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::DDoS::Policy`.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosPolicy\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-ddos-policy>

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.PolicyProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Policy`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-ddos-policy>

```
param policy_name

Property policyName: The name of the policy.

param type

Property type: The type of the policy. Values: - default: Indicates the default protection strategy. - l3: Indicates the IP protection strategy. - l4: Indicates the port protection strategy.

param action_type

Property actionType: Operation type ActionType = 10 Modify policy name ActionType = 11 Modify whitelist and whitelist timeout ActionType = 12 modify add white high anti-back source network segment switch ActionType = 13 Modify the switch to discard ICMP ActionType = 20 Add black and white list ActionType = 21 Delete whitelist and whitelist ActionType = 22 Clear White List ActionType = 23 Clear the blacklist ActionType = 30 Modify Smart Switch ActionType = 31 Modify regional ban ActionType = 32 Modify Source Speed Limit Black ActionType = 34 Modifying Reflective Port Filtering ActionType = 40,41,42 Create, delete, and modify Port rules ActionType = 50,51,52 Create, delete, and modify fingerprint rules ActionType = 60 switch L4 protection ActionType = 61,62,63 Create, delete, and modify L4 rules.

param black_ip_list

Property blackIpList: Blacklist list.

param content

Property content: Configuration Content.

param white_ip_list

Property whiteIpList: Whitelist IP list.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.PolicyProps.policy_name
documentation: Property policyName: The name of the policy.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.PolicyProps.type
documentation:
Property type: The type of the policy.

Values:

- default: Indicates the default protection strategy.
- l3: Indicates the IP protection strategy.
- l4: Indicates the port protection strategy.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.PolicyProps.action_type
documentation: Property actionType: Operation type ActionType = 10 Modify policy name ActionType = 11 Modify whitelist and whitelist timeout ActionType = 12 modify add white high anti-back source network segment switch ActionType = 13 Modify the switch to discard ICMP ActionType = 20 Add black and white list ActionType = 21 Delete whitelist and whitelist ActionType = 22 Clear White List ActionType = 23 Clear the blacklist ActionType = 30 Modify Smart Switch ActionType = 31 Modify regional ban ActionType = 32 Modify Source Speed Limit Black ActionType = 34 Modifying Reflective Port Filtering ActionType = 40,41,42 Create, delete, and modify Port rules ActionType = 50,51,52 Create, delete, and modify fingerprint rules ActionType = 60 switch L4 protection ActionType = 61,62,63 Create, delete, and modify L4 rules.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.PolicyProps.black_ip_list
documentation: Property blackIpList: Blacklist list.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.PolicyProps.content
documentation: Property content: Configuration Content.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.PolicyProps.white_ip_list
documentation: Property whiteIpList: Whitelist IP list.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.type
documentation:
:Property:

type: The type of the policy. Values:

- default: Indicates the default protection strategy.
- l3: Indicates the IP protection strategy.
- l4: Indicates the port protection strategy.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.action_type
documentation:
:Property:

actionType: Operation type
ActionType = 10 Modify policy name
ActionType = 11 Modify whitelist and whitelist timeout
ActionType = 12 modify add white high anti-back source network segment switch
ActionType = 13 Modify the switch to discard ICMP
ActionType = 20 Add black and white list
ActionType = 21 Delete whitelist and whitelist
ActionType = 22 Clear White List
ActionType = 23 Clear the blacklist
ActionType = 30 Modify Smart Switch
ActionType = 31 Modify regional ban
ActionType = 32 Modify Source Speed Limit Black
ActionType = 34 Modifying Reflective Port Filtering
ActionType = 40,41,42 Create, delete, and modify Port rules
ActionType = 50,51,52 Create, delete, and modify fingerprint rules
ActionType = 60 switch L4 protection
ActionType = 61,62,63 Create, delete, and modify L4 rules.

documentation: :Property: arg: Matching target character.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.ContentProperty.__init__
documentation:
---
param black_ip_list_expire_at: true
param enable_defense: true
param enable_drop_icmp: true
param enable_intelligence: true
param finger_print_rule_list: true
param intelligence_level: true
param layer4_rule_list: true
param port_rule_list: true
param reflect_block_udp_port_list: true
param region_block_country_list: true
param region_block_province_list: true

---

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.ContentProperty.black_ip_list_expire_at
documentation: :Property: blackIpListExpireAt: Blacklist and whitelist timeout.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.ContentProperty.enable_defense
documentation: :Property: enableDefense: Whether to enable L4 protection.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.ContentProperty.enable_drop_icmp
documentation: :Property: enableDropIcmp: Switch to discard ICMP.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.ContentProperty.enable_intelligence
documentation: :Property: enableIntelligence: Whether the intelligent switch is on.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.ContentProperty.finger_print_rule_list
documentation: :Property: fingerPrintRuleList: Fingerprint Rules.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.ContentProperty.intelligence_level
documentation: :Property: intelligenceLevel: Smart mode. Valid values: weak, hard, and default.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.ContentProperty.layer4_rule_list
documentation: :Property: layer4RuleList: L4 protection rules.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.ContentProperty.port_rule_list
documentation: :Property: portRuleList: Port Rule List.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.ContentProperty.reflect_block_udp_port_list
documentation: :Property: reflectBlockUdpPortList: Reflective port filtering.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.ContentProperty.region_block_country_list
documentation: :Property: regionBlockCountryList: List of Regional Banned Countries.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.ContentProperty.region_block_province_list
documentation: :Property: regionBlockProvinceList: List of Prohibited Provinces by Region.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.ContentProperty.source_block_list
documentation: :Property: sourceBlockList: Source pull Black.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.ContentProperty.source_limit
documentation: :Property: sourceLimit: Do not fill in when the source speed limit is deleted.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.ContentProperty.whiten_gfbr_nets
documentation: :Property: whitenGfbrNets: Add white high protection back to source network segment switch.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.FingerPrintRuleListProperty.__init__
documentation:
---
param dst_port_end: true
param dst_port_start: true
param finger_print_rule_id: true
param match_action: true
param max_pkt_len: true
param min_pkt_len: true
param offset: true
param payload_bytes: true
param protocol: true
param rate_value: true
param seq_no: true
param src_port_end: true
param src_port_start: true
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.FingerPrintRuleListProperty.dst_port_end
documentation: :Property: dstPortEnd: End of destination port 0-65535.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.FingerPrintRuleListProperty.dst_port_start
documentation: :Property: dstPortStart: Destination Port start 0-65535.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.FingerPrintRuleListProperty.match_action
documentation: :Property: matchAction: Actions. Currently, drop, accept, session_rate, and ip_rate are supported.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.FingerPrintRuleListProperty.max_pkt_len
documentation: :Property: maxPktLen: Maximum bag length.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.FingerPrintRuleListProperty.min_pkt_len
documentation: :Property: minPktLen: Minimum package length.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.FingerPrintRuleListProperty.protocol
documentation: :Property: protocol: Protocol, tcp or udp.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.FingerPrintRuleListProperty.seq_no
documentation: :Property: seqNo: Serial number 1-100 Affects the order issued by the bottom layer The larger the number, the lower it is.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.FingerPrintRuleListProperty.src_port_end
documentation: :Property: srcPortEnd: Source Port end 0-65535.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.FingerPrintRuleListProperty.src_port_start
documentation: :Property: srcPortStart: Source port start 0-65535.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.FingerPrintRuleListProperty.finger_print_rule_id
documentation: :Property: fingerPrintRuleId: The UUID of the rule is required to be deleted and modified, and it is not required to be created.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.FingerPrintRuleListProperty.offset
documentation: :Property: offset: Offset.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.FingerPrintRuleListProperty.payload_bytes
documentation: :Property: payloadBytes: Load match, hexadecimal string; Similar to 'abcd'.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.FingerPrintRuleListProperty.rate_value
documentation: :Property: rateValue: Speed limit value 1-100000.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.Layer4RuleListProperty.__init__
documentation:
---
param action: true
param condition_list: true
param limited: true
param match: true
param method: true
param name: true
param priority: true
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.Layer4RuleListProperty.action
documentation: :Property: action: 1 for observation 2 for blocking.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.Layer4RuleListProperty.condition_list
documentation: :Property: conditionList: Matching Condition.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.Layer4RuleListProperty.limited
documentation: :Property: limited: <2048, length limit, 0 means no limit.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.Layer4RuleListProperty.match
documentation: :Property: match: 0 indicates that the condition is not met 1 indicates that the condition is met.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.Layer4RuleListProperty.method
documentation: :Property: method: Char indicates a string match hex match.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.Layer4RuleListProperty.name
documentation: :Property: name: Rule Name.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.Layer4RuleListProperty.priority
documentation: :Property: priority: 1-100, priority, the lower the number, the higher the priority.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.PortRuleListProperty.dst_port_end
documentation: :Property: dstPortEnd: End of destination port 0-65535.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.PortRuleListProperty.dst_port_start
documentation: :Property: dstPortStart: Destination Port start 0-65535.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.PortRuleListProperty.protocol
documentation: :Property: protocol: Protocol, tcp or udp.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.PortRuleListProperty.seq_no
documentation: :Property: seqNo: Serial number 1-100 Affects the order issued by the bottom layer The larger the number, the lower it is.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.PortRuleListProperty.src_port_end
documentation: :Property: srcPortEnd: Source Port end 0-65535.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.PortRuleListProperty.src_port_start
documentation: :Property: srcPortStart: Source port start 0-65535.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.PortRuleListProperty.port_rule_id
documentation: :Property: portRuleId: Rule UUID is required to be deleted and modified, and is not required to be created.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.SourceBlockListProperty.__init__
documentation:
---
param block_expire_seconds: true
param every_seconds: true
param exceed_limit_times: true
param type: true
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.SourceBlockListProperty.block_expire_seconds
documentation: :Property: blockExpireSeconds: Statistical cycle range 60-1200.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.SourceBlockListProperty.every_seconds
documentation: :Property: everySeconds: The time (unit second) for automatically releasing the black after triggering the speed limit is 60~2592000.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.SourceBlockListProperty.exceed_limit_times
documentation: :Property: exceedLimitTimes: The number of times the speed limit is exceeded in a statistical period ranges from 1 to 1200.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.SourceBlockListProperty.type
documentation: :Property: type: The type of black is optional source PPS speed limit Black: 3 source BPS speed limit Black: 4 SYNPPS speed limit Black: 5 SYNBPS speed limit Black: 6.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.SourceLimitProperty.__init__
documentation:
---
param bps: true
param pps: true
param syn_bps: true
param syn_pps: true
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.SourceLimitProperty.bps
documentation: :Property: bps: bps range 1024~268435456.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.SourceLimitProperty.pps
documentation: :Property: pps: Pps range 32~500000.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.SourceLimitProperty.syn_bps
documentation: :Property: synBps: SynBps range 1024~268435456.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicy.SourceLimitProperty.syn_pps
documentation: :Property: synPps: SynPps range 1~100000.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::DDoS::Policy`.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `Policy` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-ddos-policy>

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicyProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `RosPolicy`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-ddos-policy>

```
param policy_name



param type



param action_type



param black_ip_list



param content



param white_ip_list

```

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicyProps.policy_name
documentation: :Property: policyName: The name of the policy.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicyProps.type
documentation:
:Property:

type: The type of the policy. Values:

- default: Indicates the default protection strategy.
- l3: Indicates the IP protection strategy.
- l4: Indicates the port protection strategy.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicyProps.action_type
documentation:
:Property:

actionType: Operation type
ActionType = 10 Modify policy name
ActionType = 11 Modify whitelist and whitelist timeout
ActionType = 12 modify add white high anti-back source network segment switch
ActionType = 13 Modify the switch to discard ICMP
ActionType = 20 Add black and white list
ActionType = 21 Delete whitelist and whitelist
ActionType = 22 Clear White List
ActionType = 23 Clear the blacklist
ActionType = 30 Modify Smart Switch
ActionType = 31 Modify regional ban
ActionType = 32 Modify Source Speed Limit Black
ActionType = 34 Modifying Reflective Port Filtering
ActionType = 40,41,42 Create, delete, and modify Port rules
ActionType = 50,51,52 Create, delete, and modify fingerprint rules
ActionType = 60 switch L4 protection
ActionType = 61,62,63 Create, delete, and modify L4 rules.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicyProps.black_ip_list
documentation: :Property: blackIpList: Blacklist list.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicyProps.content
documentation: :Property: content: Configuration Content.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ddos.RosPolicyProps.white_ip_list
documentation: :Property: whiteIpList: Whitelist IP list.
